subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! The letter which thou didst send through his honour Mírzá Ḥaydar-'Alí hath reached me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم نامه ایکه بواسطه جناب آقا میرزا حیدر علی ارسال نموده بودی رسید از
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
